text:
was a city in western Marley which contained a military base.

Story

Marley arc

While disguised as a Marleyan soldier during her infiltration of Liberio, Yelena claims to have formerly been stationed in Lakua.

Trivia

Lakua shares its name with the real-world , a district of in .
